evals.prompt: Write a user story in docs/user-stories for FR-01 in prd-00020-checkout-redesign about letting shoppers complete checkout without creating an account.
evals.expected_output: A new main user story saved under docs/user-stories with parent prd-00020-checkout-redesign, function_requirement_id FR-01, and the standard user story template filled in.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/user-stories.
The new file front matter has type us, role main, status draft, parent prd-00020-checkout-redesign, and function_requirement_id FR-01.
The new file includes the User Story, Acceptance Criteria, and Definition of Done sections with at least three AC-xx checklist items.

evals.prompt: Create an active user story in docs/user-stories for FR-02 in prd-00020-checkout-redesign about routing high-risk guest checkout orders to manual review.
evals.expected_output: A new main user story saved under docs/user-stories with status active, parent prd-00020-checkout-redesign, function_requirement_id FR-02, and clear acceptance criteria.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/user-stories.
The new file front matter has type us, role main, status active, parent prd-00020-checkout-redesign, and function_requirement_id FR-02.
The new file includes the User Story, Acceptance Criteria, and Definition of Done sections with at least three AC-xx checklist items.

evals.prompt: Add a patch user story in docs/user-stories for FR-03 in prd-00020-checkout-redesign to clarify the guest checkout confirmation email flow.
evals.expected_output: A new patch user story saved under docs/user-stories with role patch, parent prd-00020-checkout-redesign, function_requirement_id FR-03, and the standard user story structure.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/user-stories.
The new file front matter has type us, role patch, status draft, parent prd-00020-checkout-redesign, and function_requirement_id FR-03.
The new file includes the User Story, Acceptance Criteria, and Definition of Done sections with at least three AC-xx checklist items.
